title: Dedicated repository overview page
summary: Repository sidebar selections now open a dedicated repository overview page with README content, repository facts, snapshot summary, recent activity, timeline, repository links, and top-bar actions for opening the local editor or GitHub remote.
userVisibleChange: Selecting a repository now shows a full repository page instead of reusing the cross-repository activity view.

risks.title: README preview is intentionally lightweight
risks.mitigation: The repository page renders a bounded markdown preview rather than a full markdown engine; build and browser screenshots verified it remains readable.

timeline.title: Built dedicated repository page
timeline.summary: Replaced the repository route with a page-level overview using existing repository metadata, snapshots, details, and top-bar actions.

timeline.title: Ran automated and visual checks
timeline.summary: Verified with go test ./..., npm run build, and Playwright desktop/mobile screenshots of /repositories/eve.

decisions.title: Keep repository actions in the global top bar
decisions.rationale: The mockup places editor and GitHub actions in the top bar, so the page consumes the existing repository metadata and leaves those commands globally available on repository routes.

decisions.title: Reuse local runtime metadata
decisions.rationale: The repo page uses the existing repository detail endpoint for branch, dirty state, remote URL, README, language, size, and creation facts instead of duplicating Git logic in the browser.

validation.output: tsc --noEmit and vite build completed successfully

Captured desktop and mobile screenshots at .eve/artifacts/snap_9f27c6b09c394521/repository-page-desktop.png and .eve/artifacts/snap_9f27c6b09c394521/repository-page-mobile.png with no visible overlap or blank content.
